---
name: Existing framework equivalent
about: Argue that an existing framework already captures the same structure
title: "Existing equivalent: "
labels: redundancy, review
assignees: ''
---

## Existing Framework

Name the framework.

## Relevant Source Or Concept

Give the closest concept, method, paper, standard, or practice.

## Claimed Equivalence

Explain why it already captures:

- object x
- framework F
- actual use U
- valid scope
- excluded critical dependency
- structural error predicate

## Difference If Any

If there is a difference, describe it.

## Verdict

Choose one:

- exact equivalent
- near equivalent
- partial overlap
- weak overlap
- not equivalent after comparison
